name: feezal
description: Dashboard editor powered by Web Components and MQTT

scripts.install: cd server && npm install && cd ../www && npm install && cd .. && node scripts/generate-elements.js && cd www && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.test: npm --prefix server test && npm --prefix www test
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:browser && npm run test:e2e

author: Sebastian Raff <hobbyquaker@gmail.com>
